title: oncidium stenoglossum
intro: Oncidium stenoglossum, also known as the 'Dancing Ladies' or 'Ladies' Tresses' orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oncidium stenoglossum include its ability to aid in the relief of congestion, coughing, and fever, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Oncidium stenoglossum can be made by infusing the flowers and leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in tinctures and capsules.
